events.title: Simplified 1-page Graph Connector setup
events.titleJa: Microsoft 365 Copilot の連携機能を拡張
events.summary: Quickly set up external data connections with a single, simplified page for all Graph Connectors, reducing complexity and saving admin time. Learn more.

events.title: Add enterprise data with new graph connections [Web]
events.titleJa: Microsoft 365 Copilot の連携機能を拡張
events.titleEn: Add enterprise data with new graph connections [Web]
events.summary: Connect your organization's data seamlessly using pre-configured graph connectors like Stack Overflow, and Salesforce Knowledge. Build smarter agents with semantic search—no custom solution required. Learn more.

events.title: Search archived mailboxes in Copilot Chat [Windows, Web, Android, iOS, Mac]
events.titleJa: Microsoft 365 Copilot の会議・チャット機能を更新
events.titleEn: Search archived mailboxes in Copilot Chat [Windows, Web, Android, iOS, Mac]
events.summary: Leverage Copilot to search emails across both primary and archived mailboxes by appending 'from my archives' or 'also look for emails in my archives' in your prompts to quickly locate key messages.
